positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring geometric trees and ethereal glowing fauna. The composition is a symmetrical, central vignette suitable for a t-shirt print. The color palette is restricted to deep navy blue, forest green, glowing cyan, and cream white, utilizing strong flat silhouettes and clean lines. The mood is magical and serene. Lighting should be dramatic, as if illuminated only by hidden starlight and neon glow from the forest floor. Art style: Clean vector art meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, high contrast, suitable for screen printing, 4K illustration, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, low contrast, amateur, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, logos, artifacts, writing, dirty, cartoonish, photo, realistic, photorealism
